items.summary: Replace the current header logo/text in Header.tsx with an animated 'Shayla' text element that has a floating, wooden/ivory-white carved (engraved) visual style. The text should appear as if it is etched into a warm ivory/cream wooden surface, with appropriate text-shadow and texture effects using CSS.

Add a water-fill animation around the 'Shayla' header text. Every second, the water level visibly rises around the text, completing a full fill cycle over 60 seconds. Implement this using an SVG clip-path or a Canvas element overlaid on the text, animating a water wave that fills from bottom to top over 60 ticks (one tick per second). After 60 seconds, the fill resets to empty and restarts.

Play an audio sound effect in the browser exactly once every 60 seconds, timed to coincide with the water completing a full fill cycle around the 'Shayla' header text. The sound should evoke the passage of time (e.g., a water drop, chime, or soft bell). Use the Web Audio API to generate a procedural tone (soft bell/chime) so no external audio file is required. The 60-second timer resets after each play.
